messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render `Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent). 179 | 180 | 
> 181 |                   {`> UPLOADING_PAYLOAD [##########] 100%\n> ENCRYPTING_DATA... DONE\n> ROUTING_TO_BKP_NODE... COMPLETE\n> STATUS: 200 OK\n> REF_ID: ${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9).toUpperCase()}\n> RESPONSE: ACKNOWLEDGED.`}
      |                                                                                                                                                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  182 |
183 |
'textRef' is assigned a value but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^[A-Z_]/u.
